race.comment: This has taken a bit of a hit and leaves us with PROVEN SOUL (11) on top. She was okay fresh on firm going at Ballarat, off a long break there and boxing on for a narrow sixth. She should improve off that and looks a genuine hope. COBBLESTONE WAY (5) won well first up in a BM56 at Kilmore, coming right away late to suggest he'd come back better than ever. Look for him to go on with it in another winnable affair. HIDDEN BAY (9) is a lightly raced type building a nice record, far too strong in a BM56 over this track and distance last start. He can handle the class rise no problems. OLLANDIA BEACH (1) was good here fresh in a similar race and will take catching with the added fitness.
